new_findings.finding: B54 carry-over sub-agent dispatch attractor did NOT recur. T2 and T5 both showed plan_spawned prefix in reply text but inline code/answer was present. Pure dispatch attractor (reply = only dispatch notice, no content) was NOT observed. B54 was N=1; B55 does not elevate to structural threshold.

Context growth with repeated plan spawning (5 plans, 11 web searches, 217 events total) did not cause empty stop. T5 produced a refusal-style reply but still non-empty. REYN_EMPTY_STOP_RETRY=1 appears effective for G12 Pattern E across all 7 long-session scenarios.

source__read called without reyn. prefix on T1 (tool_failed: unknown_tool). LLM recovered on T2+ using reyn.source__read. Env-level tool catalog prefix inconsistency — LLM sometimes drops the 'reyn.' namespace prefix on first call in a session.
